name: Fugazi
description: CRT shader tweaker with live preview. Adjust scanlines, glow, curvature, phosphor mask, vignette, brightness, and warmth in real-time. Installs directly to system for in-game use.
author: Eric Reinsmidt

changelog.v0.1.0: Initial release. Full-screen live shader preview, 8 tunable parameters, one-button system install, clear to passthrough.
changelog.v0.1.1: Preview now fills entire screen with semi-transparent UI overlay.
changelog.v0.2.0: Built-in test pattern for tuning effects, Smart Pro widescreen support, X button toggles between game image and test pattern.
